de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics

Class ClausesGraph

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.ClausesGraph

  • public class ClausesGraph
extends Object
    This class describes the relation between different clauses in a CNF. If two clauses have the same existential quantifiable variable, we say they are connected. And this property is transitive.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
